title: Codex adapter config repair started
body: Opened a narrow agentic-engineering claim to repair Codex project-agent adapter paths and clarify Codex workflow discovery. Active-claim scan found no overlap on .codex/config.toml, .codex/README.md, or ADR-125; only shared napkin overlap with Choppy Lapping Rudder claim 441366cd, so any capture there will be narrow.
